examples: "He took me for his housemaid," she said to herself as she ran.
Martha, the young housemaid, who had just risen to her feet, looked and pointed also.
He took me for his housemaid.
She wears leggings underneath her gowns and she isn't about to play housemaid to any dwarves, either.
There, Somjit, a tyrannical housemaid, grudgingly takes her in with a warning to stay far from the mistress of the house, Madame Ranjuan.
